title: Veer-Zaara
tmdbOverview: Squadron Leader Veer Pratap Singh, a pilot in the Indian Air Force, rescues the stranded Zaara, a woman from Pakistan, following a bus accident, and their lives are forever bound.
synopsis: Veer-Zaara is a 2004 drama and romance film from India. It holds a solid 7.8 rating on IMDb. A standout of 2000s cinema, it earns its spot on our lists. It carries a PG certification (US rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
